content: Event filters vs handlers in JavaFX: Filters execute during capture phase (parent-to-child), handlers during bubbling phase (child-to-parent). For Ctrl+Scroll zoom, use scene.addEventFilter(ScrollEvent.SCROLL, handler) because: (1) filter catches event before ScrollPane processes it, (2) calling e.consume() in filter prevents ScrollPane from scrolling, (3) this is critical when a ScrollPane is present (ReportsView uses ScrollPane). Using setOnScroll (handler) on root won't prevent ScrollPane from also scrolling.
